debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
⊢ Submartingale (fun i ω => ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P

failed_attempts:
have h1 : ∀ i, Integrable (fun ω => ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) P := by
    intro i
    have hX_int := IsSquareIntegrable.integrable_sq hX i
    simpa using hX_int

    have h3 : ∀ ω, (fun i ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) i ω = ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by

    have h4 : ∀ ω, (fun i ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) j ω = ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 := by

      have h7 : ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ E [‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | F i] := by
        have h14 : E [X j ω | F i] = X i ω := by
          apply hX.martingale.property
          all_goals
            try { tauto }
            try { aesop }
        have h15 : ‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 ≥ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [h14]
          all_goals
            try { nlinarith [sq_nonneg (‖X i ω‖ : ℝ), sq_nonneg (‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ : ℝ)] }
        have h16 : ‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 = E [‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | F i] := by

          have h17 : ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 = (X j ω).re ^ 2 + (X j ω).im ^ 2 := by
            simp [norm_eq_abs, Complex.normSq]
            <;> ring_nf <;> simp [pow_two]

          have h18 : ‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 = (E [X j ω | F i]).re ^ 2 + (E [X j ω | F i]).im ^ 2 := by

            <;> ring
          have h19 : E [‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | F i] = E [(X j ω).re ^ 2 + (X j ω).im ^ 2 | F i] := by

            simp [h17]
          have h20 : E [‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 | F i] = E [(E [X j ω | F i]).re ^ 2 + (E [X j ω | F i]).im ^ 2 | F i] := by

          have h21 : E [‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 | F i] = ‖E [X j ω | F i]‖ ^ 2 := by

          have h22 : E [‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 | F i] = E [(X j ω).re ^ 2 + (X j ω).im ^ 2 | F i] := by
